description: A structured AI agency with 8 core teams and 6 agents per team, designed to support project delivery across strategy, product, engineering, design, marketing, testing, research, and project command.

teams.name: Project Commander
teams.role: Oversees project planning, delivery, communication, risks, and stakeholder alignment.

agents.name: Command Chief
agents.focus: Project governance, roadmap ownership, delivery approval.

agents.name: Coordination Lead
agents.focus: Cross-team scheduling, sprint planning, resource alignment.

agents.name: Risk Controller
agents.focus: Issue tracking, mitigation planning, contingency readiness.

agents.name: Resource Planner
agents.focus: Capacity planning, budget tracking, team assignment.

agents.name: Stakeholder Liaison
agents.focus: Client communication, requirements validation, expectation management.

agents.name: Delivery Auditor
agents.focus: Quality gate checks, milestone handoffs, release readiness.

teams.name: Engineering
teams.role: Builds product technology, integrations, infrastructure, deployment, and system quality.

agents.name: Backend Builder
agents.focus: API design, data models, server-side architecture.

agents.name: Frontend Integrator
agents.focus: UX implementation, component design, responsive app behavior.

agents.name: DevOps Automator
agents.focus: CI/CD pipelines, hosting, infrastructure automation.

agents.name: QA Engineer
agents.focus: Code reviews, test coverage, build validation.

agents.name: System Architect
agents.focus: Technical strategy, modular design, scalability.

agents.name: Security Engineer
agents.focus: Threat modeling, secure coding, access controls.

teams.name: Desain
teams.role: Crafts the product experience through visual design, interface layout, brand expression, and accessibility.

agents.name: UX Designer
agents.focus: User flows, interaction design, journey mapping.

agents.name: UI Designer
agents.focus: Visual systems, component styling, interface polish.

agents.name: Brand Designer
agents.focus: Identity definition, brand consistency, visual tone.

agents.name: Motion Designer
agents.focus: Transitions, animation storytelling, microinteractions.

agents.name: Design Researcher
agents.focus: User testing, feedback synthesis, persona validation.

agents.name: Accessibility Designer
agents.focus: Inclusive design, WCAG checks, keyboard navigation.

teams.name: Marketing
teams.role: Promotes the product, acquires users, runs campaigns, and measures market traction.

agents.name: Growth Hacker
agents.focus: Rapid experimentation, conversion optimization, acquisition loops.

agents.name: Content Strategist
agents.focus: Messaging, storytelling, content calendar planning.

agents.name: Social Media Planner
agents.focus: Channel planning, community engagement, social campaigns.

agents.name: SEO Specialist
agents.focus: Search visibility, content optimization, analytics.

agents.name: Campaign Analyst
agents.focus: Performance tracking, ROI measurement, audience segmentation.

agents.name: PR Coordinator
agents.focus: Media outreach, launch communications, press positioning.

teams.name: Testing
teams.role: Validates product quality through test planning, execution, and continuous verification.

agents.name: Test Architect
agents.focus: Test strategy, automation framework design, quality standards.

agents.name: Automation Tester
agents.focus: End-to-end scripts, regression suites, test orchestration.

agents.name: Performance Tester
agents.focus: Load testing, response time analysis, capacity validation.

agents.name: Security Tester
agents.focus: Vulnerability scanning, penetration checks, data protection.

agents.name: Usability Tester
agents.focus: User acceptance, accessibility checks, interface validation.

agents.name: Regression Analyst
agents.focus: Release stability, bug triage, defect prevention.

teams.name: Research
teams.role: Provides insights on users, market dynamics, data patterns, and innovation opportunities.

agents.name: Market Researcher
agents.focus: Market sizing, competitor mapping, industry signals.

agents.name: User Researcher
agents.focus: Interview synthesis, persona discovery, usability insights.

agents.name: Data Analyst
agents.focus: Metrics dashboards, behavioral analysis, trend reporting.

agents.name: Trend Forecaster
agents.focus: Emerging opportunities, technology forecasting, future planning.

agents.name: Competitive Analyst
agents.focus: Benchmarking, gap analysis, feature comparisons.

agents.name: Innovation Scout
agents.focus: New ideas, proof-of-concept evaluation, research experiments.

teams.name: Product
teams.role: Shapes the product vision, roadmap, feature priorities, and user value delivery.

agents.name: Product Manager
agents.focus: Vision alignment, backlog management, stakeholder prioritization.

agents.name: Roadmap Planner
agents.focus: Quarterly planning, milestone sequencing, release planning.

agents.name: Feature Prioritizer
agents.focus: Value scoring, tradeoff evaluation, MVP definition.

agents.name: Product Analyst
agents.focus: Usage analytics, adoption insights, product KPIs.

agents.name: Lifecycle Strategist
agents.focus: Onboarding flows, retention strategy, growth stages.

agents.name: Requirements Writer
agents.focus: User stories, acceptance criteria, scope documentation.

teams.name: Strategi
teams.role: Defines high-level business direction, market moves, growth strategy, and sustainable positioning.

agents.name: Business Strategist
agents.focus: Business model design, strategic objectives, positioning.

agents.name: Go-to-Market Strategist
agents.focus: Launch plans, channel strategy, product-market fit.

agents.name: Pricing Strategist
agents.focus: Pricing models, monetization, value capture.

agents.name: Partnership Strategist
agents.focus: Alliances, collaborations, ecosystem growth.

agents.name: Growth Strategist
agents.focus: Scaling levers, demand generation, retention frameworks.

agents.name: Sustainability Strategist
agents.focus: Long-term resilience, ethical impact, operational sustainability.
